title: Kasai Sora PvP Modpack [Fan Made]

body:

## Information

**Kasai Sora PvP Fan Made Modpack With Alot Of Performance Boost and QOL PvP Features**

Kasai Sora PvP A life changing Modpack That provides performance Like Performium With More PvP Features. Its a Fan Made Creation So Dont Think that its an official Membercat/KasaiSroa Modpack. **Guarantee FPS INCREASE**

# PERFORMIUM

<details>
<summary>Peroformium</summary>

# Loaders
Performium is powered by Fabric, an innovative modding toolchain for Minecraft, designed for maximum efficiency and flexibility.

# Tweaks
Performium enhances your Minecraft experience with a variety of features and improvements, including:

- Stunning shaders
- Seamless connected textures
- Enhanced models.
- Optimized mouse controls
- Real-time FPS/Ping displays
- And much more!
# Minimal Mods
Performium maintains a streamlined mod count, capping at 60 mods (excluding necessary dependencies). This makes it ideal for older computers and lower-spec hardware.

# Compatibility
Performium is for versions 1.20.4 - 1.21+ and has been tested with the Modrinth App, Prism Launcher, and ATLauncher.

It's always advised to use the latest version of Performium to get the best experience.

</details>


</details>
